---
title: "Ken Osumi"
subtitle: "Reading the internal representations of protein language models to generate residue-level mechanistic hypotheses."
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true
  fields: [date, title, reading-time, description]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---
